channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bike stand loose, 22nd April
item.description:
North east corner of High Holborn & Red Lion Street The bike stand closest to the Legible London map is loose in the ground, if someone locks their bike to it it may be possible for someone to lift the stand out the ground then remove the bike.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, High Holborn, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Random ribbish, 22nd April
item.description:
A large bag of magazines, portfolio folders and other bits if crao have just been dumped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reynolds Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Patshull place, 22nd April
item.description:
I have only just noticed this curbstone dislodged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Patshull Place, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 72 Brondesbury villas, 22nd April
item.description:
See photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London

item.title: Flytipping Barry Road, 22nd April
item.description:
Flytipping to be cleared on Barry Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 Brondesbury road, 22nd April
item.description:
Pram bagged waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Dog waste bags thrown on footpath, 22nd April
item.description:
Dog waste bags constantly dropped on junction of public footpath (No 171) and pavement/grass verge outside 20 Barton Road. Two days ago I cleared 12 black dog waste bags which had been left behind the steel fibre optic cable junction box which is on the corner of the grass verge. Yesterday a new white dog waste bags was left on the pavement in front of the box and has now been blown to the pavement in front of No 18.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barton Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The seat in this shelter is broken, 22nd April
item.description:
Dangerous broken seat by Noko Asian food and bar

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Heygate Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 30 Rochester Road, 22nd April
item.description:
Upper part of chestnut is dead - has been previously reported.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Rochester Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The problem is at the end of the road and need to be filled in urgently as it is deep., 22nd April
item.description:
I am currently in A&E having fallen down the pothole and damaged my ankle. Due to the risk to health, this pothole needs to be filled as a matter or urgency.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Achilles Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Posting by Wickes. Costa have also recently added a fly-poster on the side of their building., 22nd April
item.description:
Fly Posting by Wickes on the railings on Blackheath Road - even though the council tell them not to they do it from time to time with impunity. Costa have also recently added a fly-poster on the side of their building even though they know they're not allowed to. Cheers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Blackheath Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cupboard / shelving unit dumped on pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
It’s been left here all week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rendlesham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed head boards left by full waste Bin, 22nd April
item.description:
A fly tipper has dumped a metal bed head and footer Also The waste bin is repeatedly filling up as it’s placed too close to the park entrance and is only emptied approx twice a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersmead Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen branch, 22nd April
item.description:
Looks like a branch or two are falling off this tree and hitting the building opposite

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of rubble/ tiles dumped, 22nd April
item.description:
A litter pick and river clean took place today as part of the Community Impact day - the nitrous oxide canisters and bin bags were collected but the plastic box retrieved from the river was left and now a bag of builders waste has been left on top of it- next to the bin in Cator park at the entrance opposite Ringwold Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersmead Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip small van load, 22nd April
item.description:
Looks like builders waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wick Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extensive potholes along the length of Brecnock Road, 22nd April
item.description:
There are extensive potholes alone the length of Brecknock Road which cannot be avoided when driving. These have been present for a number of years of months and continue to increase in size and extent of the road affective
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Brecknock Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green scrambler racing up & down on the green, 22nd April
item.description:
Every day a green scrambler is racing up & down on the green,very noisy bike,this is green space for people to enjoy,walk there dogs & for kids to play. It ruins it for everyone,it’s not a scrambler track. This is a residential area & is a disturbance of peoples peace. It’s also churning up the grass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Renovation/commercial trash dumped, 22nd April
item.description:
Fly tipping took place in broad daylight. Will continue to report the near daily dumping until preventative action taken

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and dog fouling, 22nd April
item.description:
Litter and dog fouling at the corner of Homerton Road and Adley street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
